case_title: JACALYN KINNEY VS. KRISTINA DANIELLE GRIFFITH et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT GRIFFITH, KRISTINA DANIELLE RAPELLA, MARIA JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 DAYS
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUL-15-2013. MAY-15-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KINNEY, JACALYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRIFFITH, KRISTINA DANIELLE $19,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,500.00, STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KINNEY, JACALYN AS TO DEFENDANT GRIFFITH, KRISTINA DANIELLE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KINNEY, JACALYN AS TO DEFENDANT GRIFFITH, KRISTINA DANIELLE RAPELLA, MARIA DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-15-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-11-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-30-2013
JURY FEES DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT GRIFFITH, KRISTINA DANIELLE
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR CHARLES OLIVER THOMPSON.
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT GRIFFITH, KRISTINA DANIELLE RAPELLA, MARIA
AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR WALOVICH, JOHN PAUL
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT GRIFFITH, KRISTINA DANIELLE RAPELLA, MARIA
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KINNEY, JACALYN JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL OF REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KINNEY, JACALYN
ARBITRATOR JOHN PAUL WALOVICH APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUL-29-2013 THROUGH OCT-27-2013.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KINNEY, JACALYN SERVED DEC-27-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAPELLA, MARIA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KINNEY, JACALYN SERVED JAN-14-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GRIFFITH, KRISTINA DANIELLE
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE JUL-25-2013.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT WAGE LOSS AND LOSS OF EARNING CAPACITY CLAIM (SECTION 11(A) AND 11(F)) OF THE COMPLAINT
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO WAGE LOSS AND LOSS OF EARNING CAPACITY CLAIM(SECTION 11(A) AND 11(F) OF THE COMPLAIN.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR CHARLES OLIVER THOMPSON.
